Perfect! I've successfully completed the CRSP earnings data scraping task.

## Summary

**Status: Complete** ✓

**Results:**
- **30 articles collected** and saved to `/Users/aryaask/Desktop/quant/data/raw/earnings-flagship-B/_news/CRSP/`
- **Manifest file** created at `_done` with timestamp: `2026-05-16T01:06:18Z`

**Article Coverage:**
The 30 articles comprehensively cover CRSP (CRISPR Therapeutics) across multiple dimensions:

1. **Earnings Results** (6 articles) - Q1-Q4 2024, Q3 2025 financial results
2. **Commercial Progress** (3 articles) - CASGEVY sales, adoption metrics, reimbursement
3. **Clinical Pipeline** (5 articles) - CTX112 CAR-T, CTX310/CTX320 cardiovascular programs, CTX131
4. **Financial Forecasts** (2 articles) - Analyst price targets, revenue guidance 2025-2027
5. **Strategic & Risk** (5 articles) - Competitive threats, valuation analysis, long-term viability
6. **Regulatory & Approvals** (2 articles) - FDA approval timeline, clinical milestones
7. **Technical & Market** (2 articles) - Stock technical analysis, analyst sentiment
8. **Business Updates** (4 articles) - Strategic priorities, partnerships, operational updates
9. **Company Overview** (1 article) - Financial statements and historical trends

All articles follow the strict JSON schema with proper timestamping and source attribution.

Sources:
- [CRISPR Therapeutics Investor Relations](https://ir.crisprtx.com/)
- [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/)
- [TipRanks](https://www.tipranks.com/)
- [FDA](https://www.fda.gov/)
- [Vertex Pharmaceuticals](https://investors.vrtx.com/)
